technologies.name: Supabase Realtime (Postgres Changes)
technologies.usage: Listen to INSERT/UPDATE on metric tables.

technologies.name: Supabase Realtime (Broadcast)
technologies.usage: Low-latency ephemeral updates (e.g., typing, cursor, transient alerts).

verifiedClaims.claim: useEffect cleanup is mandatory to prevent redundant subscriptions.
RLS policies are enforced at the Realtime server level.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Maximum throughput of 1000 msg/sec per connection.
unverifiedClaims.notes: Depends on Supabase plan and payload size. Need benchmarking.

implementationPatterns.name: Hook Subscription Pattern
implementationPatterns.description: Create useRealtimeSubscription hook that handles subscribe/unsubscribe on mount/unmount.

implementationPatterns.name: Throttling Pattern
implementationPatterns.description: Use lodash.throttle or similar for high-frequency metric broadcasts.
